title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・パレードを率いて

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I ran so well today, all the way to the
finish line!
choice_data_list: Congratulations on beating T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I only got there first because of your
help.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-waaait?! Is this really okay? Shouldn't victory
go to the main character instead?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Drat! I foiled myself! Was I too concerned with
running in my Overlord pomp?! Just when did
you—

They both seem appalled. However, a race is a
race—and a win is a win.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Even though it was just a fluke, I feel a little more confident knowing that I can beat Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll be okay, Trainer! I can handle any distance,
and any senior G1 race!

The spring Tenno Sho plaque imbues confidence
in Meisho Doto.
